message: fix: italicize standout quotes and dim slide labels

files.patch:
@@ -84,7 +84,7 @@ installed, auto mode can use local CLI models when `cli.enabled` is set (see `do
 
 - Video and podcast summaries ignore sponsor/ads/promotional segments; do not include them in the summary.
 - Do not mention sponsor/ads or that they were skipped.
-- Include 1-2 short direct quotes only when a standout line is present; otherwise omit quotes. Never mention ads/sponsors/boilerplate or that you skipped/ignored them.
+- Include 1-2 short direct quotes (italic, in quotation marks) only when a standout line is present; otherwise omit quotes. Never mention ads/sponsors/boilerplate or that you skipped/ignored them.
 
 ## Z.AI

@@ -67,7 +67,7 @@ export function buildFileSummaryPrompt({
     directive.formatting,
     'Format the answer in Markdown.',
     'Use short paragraphs; use bullet lists only when they improve scanability; avoid rigid templates.',
-    'When there is a standout line, include 1-2 short direct quotes (max 25 words each) in quotation marks. Otherwise omit quotes. Never quote ads, sponsors, or boilerplate, and never mention them or that you skipped/ignored them.',
+    'When there is a standout line, include 1-2 short direct quotes (max 25 words each) in italics with quotation marks (e.g. _"..."_). Otherwise omit quotes. Never quote ads, sponsors, or boilerplate, and never mention them or that you skipped/ignored them.',
     'Do not use emojis.',
     presetLengthLine,
     maxCharactersLine,
@@ -153,7 +153,7 @@ export function buildFileTextSummaryPrompt({
     directive.formatting,
     'Format the answer in Markdown.',
     'Use short paragraphs; use bullet lists only when they improve scanability; avoid rigid templates.',
-    'When there is a standout line, include 1-2 short direct quotes (max 25 words each) in quotation marks. Otherwise omit quotes. Never quote ads, sponsors, or boilerplate, and never mention them or that you skipped/ignored them.',
+    'When there is a standout line, include 1-2 short direct quotes (max 25 words each) in italics with quotation marks (e.g. _"..."_). Otherwise omit quotes. Never quote ads, sponsors, or boilerplate, and never mention them or that you skipped/ignored them.',
     'Do not use emojis.',
     presetLengthLine,
     maxCharactersLine,

@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ import { prepareMarkdownForTerminalStreaming } from '../../markdown.js'
 import { createSlidesInlineRenderer } from '../../slides-render.js'
 import { createStreamOutputGate, type StreamOutputMode } from '../../stream-output.js'
 import type { SummaryStreamHandler } from '../../summary-engine.js'
-import { isRichTty, markdownRenderWidth, supportsColor } from '../../terminal.js'
+import { ansi, isRichTty, markdownRenderWidth, supportsColor } from '../../terminal.js'
 import {
   buildTimestampUrl,
   formatOsc8Link,
@@ -221,7 +221,8 @@ export function createSlidesTerminalOutput({
       ? formatOsc8Link(timestampLabel, timestampUrl, isRichTty(io.stdout) && !flags.plain)
       : null
     const slideLabelBase = total > 0 ? `Slide ${index}/${total}` : `Slide ${index}`
-    const label = timeLink ? `${slideLabelBase} · ${timeLink}` : slideLabelBase
+    const rawLabel = timeLink ? `${slideLabelBase} · ${timeLink}` : slideLabelBase
+    const label = ansi('2', rawLabel, supportsColor(io.stdout, io.envForRun) && !flags.plain)
 
     clearProgressForStdout()
     io.stdout.write('\n')
